entries.reason: Current discovery still emits the pre-approved a/C/d tree and has no B - Desired State group.
Current VSIX publishDiscovery replaces the TestController collection and creates new TestItem instances.
Current run-event application allows an explicit test_started event after the same item reached a terminal state.
Current real binary has no dry-run resolution mode for sweeping every discovery-served runnable id.

On a real vscode.TestController the exclusive-group deactivated sibling keeps its result because invalidateClearedResults only calls invalidateTestResults (marks the result outdated, not removed); cr-115 rebuilds/removes the sibling item to drop it.
